title: KDNA Improvement Proposal
description: Schema for structured, versioned requests to change the judgment layer of a KDNA domain. Improvement proposals are the governance objects that connect agent experience to human-reviewed domain evolution.

proposal_id.description: Unique identifier for this proposal. Format: prop_{domain}_{date}_{sequence}.

domain.description: Target domain identifier, including scope. Example: @aikdna/decision_state

domain_version.description: Version of the domain this proposal applies to.

proposed_change_type.description: Category of judgment update being proposed.

target_element.description: Specific element within the domain that this proposal targets.

file.description: KDNA file containing the target element.

element_id.description: ID of the specific element (axiom, misunderstanding, scenario, etc.) to change.

parent_id.description: Optional parent ID for nested elements.

summary.description: Brief summary of what this evidence shows.

url.description: Optional link to the full evidence.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the proposed change.

proposed_content.description: Optional: the full proposed new content for the target element. If omitted, the proposal describes a problem without prescribing the exact fix.

risk_if_accepted.description: What could go wrong if this change is adopted.

risk_if_rejected.description: What could go wrong if this change is ignored.

requires_human_lock.description: Whether this proposal MUST receive human approval before application. Always true for judgment updates.

status.description: Current state of the proposal in the governance pipeline.

review.description: Review decision, populated when status is accepted or rejected.

human_lock.description: Human Judgment Lock record, populated when the proposal is accepted.

proposal_id.description: Reference to the improvement proposal that triggered this lock.

locked_by.description: Identity of the human who applied the lock.

affected_files.description: KDNA files affected by the locked change.

superseded_by.description: If status is superseded, the proposal_id that replaced this one.

updated_at.description: When the proposal was last updated.
